sourceMovie.title: Rogue
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Rogue works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Black Panther
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Rogue clicked for you, Black Panther (2018) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Commando
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Rogue clicked for you, Commando (1985) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Rogue?
faq.answer: Try Black Panther, Commando, Predator: Badlands—each shares DNA with Rogue while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Rogue?
faq.answer: Rogue (2020) is best described as Action, Adventure. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Rogue worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
